commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/stage4/disagg-1p1d.yaml /tmp/disagg-1p1d.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete deploy sglang-baseline -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete svc sglang-baseline -n efa-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete -f /tmp/disagg-1p1d.yaml --ignore-not-found 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods,svc -n efa-validation -o wide 2>&1 | grep -E sglang'
